description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem multi-terminal dc line converters. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, iarray = amultitrmdcconvint(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, iarray = amultitrmdcconvint(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem converter buses of multi-terminal dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem multi-terminal dc line converters to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the multi-terminal dc line converter quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines only.
for the subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for the non-subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines and the subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines.
for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines and tie multi-terminal dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service multi-terminal dc lines.

string.description: 1 for a voltage controlling converter, 3 for a rectifier, 4 for an inverter.
1 for a positive pole converter, -1 for a negative pole converter.
Number of the dc bus connected to this converter bus.
Number of the optional second dc bus connected to this converter bus.
Converter angle limit code: -1 (at or below low limit), 0 (in range), or 1 (at or above high limit).
Converter tap ratio limit code: -1 (at or below low limit), 0 (in range), 1 (at or above high limit), or -2 (locked).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
